items.title: Rousey vs. Carano is a sign of the times -- with a silver lining
items.description: Ronda Rousey vs. Gina Carano is an opportunity for two pioneers of women's MMA to have a night in the spotlight they created.

items.title: Shiffrin ends Olympic drought with slalom gold

items.title: UCLA's Cronin ejects own player after flagrant foul

items.title: Klaebo joins Phelps as only 10-gold Olympians
items.description: Norway's Johannes Hoesflot Klaebo won a 10th gold medal in cross country skiing, putting him in an exclusive group with swimming great Michael Phelps.
